case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. JACASTA ALLEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED JUN-03-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEN, JACASTA
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS SPECIALTY SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEN, JACASTA $1,997.25 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 INTEREST, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,297.25, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
